languages.text: С начала раскопок рабочие проделали немалую и нелегкую работу, очищая вход в руины.
Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.
languages.original_text: С начала раскопок рабочие проделали немалую и нелегкую работу, очищая вход в руины.

traits.locale_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.
Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.
Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

languages.text: 発掘工事が始まって以来、遺跡の入り口をクリアするという大変な作業で、作業員たちは大きな進歩を遂げてきました。
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: 発掘工事が始まって以来、遺跡の入り口をクリアするという大変な作業で、作業員たちは大きな進歩を遂げてきました。

languages.text: Kazı başladığından beri işçiler, harabelerin girişini temizlemek gibi zorlu bir görevde büyük ilerleme kaydetti.
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: Kazı başladığından beri işçiler, harabelerin girişini temizlemek gibi zorlu bir görevde büyük ilerleme kaydetti.

languages.text: Desde que empezó la excavación, los trabajadores han progresado mucho en la ardua tarea de despejar la entrada de las ruinas.
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: Desde que empezó la excavación, los trabajadores han progresado mucho en la ardua tarea de despejar la entrada de las ruinas.

languages.text: 挖掘开始后，工人们一直在全力清理废墟入口，好在他们已经取得了重大进展。
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: 挖掘开始后，工人们一直在全力清理废墟入口，好在他们已经取得了重大进展。

languages.text: Depuis que les fouilles ont commencé, les ouvriers ont bien progressé dans la tâche ô combien ardue qui consiste à dégager l'entrée des ruines.
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: Depuis que les fouilles ont commencé, les ouvriers ont bien progressé dans la tâche ô combien ardue qui consiste à dégager l'entrée des ruines.

languages.text: Seit dem Beginn der Ausgrabung haben die Arbeiter bei der Freilegung des Eingangs der Ruinen große Fortschritte erzielt.
languages.original_text: Since the excavation began, workers have made great progress in the arduous task of clearing the entrance to the ruins.

traits.locale_text: Seit dem Beginn der Ausgrabung haben die Arbeiter bei der Freilegung des Eingangs der Ruinen große Fortschritte erzielt.
